content.description:
A 2D spatial windowing environment that renders attachments as draggable, resizable windows. The primary container view for organizing multiple items visually.

## Window Management

- **Floating windows**: Freely positioned with drag handles and resize corners
- **Pinned windows**: Corner-anchored, stay in place relative to viewport corner
- **Docked windows**: Edge-anchored (left/right/top/bottom), fill perpendicular axis
- **Minimize/Maximize**: Windows can be minimized to taskbar or maximized to fill canvas

## Child Specification

Each child in `item.attachments` has a `view` object:
```javascript
{ id: "item-id", view: { x, y, width, height, z, anchor, minimized, maximized, type } }
```

## Background Layer

Always renders an inner view as full-bleed background beneath windows. When switching to Spatial Canvas, the previous view automatically becomes the background. Change via View As > Spatial Canvas submenu.

## View Menu Integration

Exports `getViewMenuItems()` to contribute background view options to the global "View As..." menu when active.

## Sibling Container Protocol

Provides `siblingContainer.addSibling(itemId, navigateTo)` to child views, enabling:
- Item links to open as new windows instead of navigating
- Preserving context while exploring related items
- Automatic window positioning and z-index management

## Scroll Preservation

Maintains scroll positions within window content areas across re-renders.
